prompt: Reproduce the ornate vintage Chinese voucher FRAME from the attached image exactly - the same rich engraved fret border, the same corner ornaments, the same layered rule lines, the same cloud-motif accents, the same bottom floral flourish, the same frame richness and proportions. Recolor to this palette: background field harvest gold #E0AC45; ALL fret border line work, corner ornaments, cloud motifs, and rules in DARK IMPERIAL GREEN #113A1A (a deep blackish forest green - the line work must be clearly dark green, NOT red, NOT orange, NOT gold); a single thin outer edge border in cinnabar red #D93A35; thin keyline accents in porcelain cream #F5F1E6. Leave the ENTIRE center completely EMPTY harvest-gold field - no text, no drink, no seal, no words - just blank gold paper framed by the dark green ornate border. Flat aged chromolithograph print style, subtle paper grain, no drop shadows, no photorealism. Square 1:1.
